question:
Dumpuses are wooden. Dumpuses are rompuses. Rompuses are small. Rompuses are jompuses. Jompuses are orange. Jompuses are wumpuses. Each wumpus is earthy. Each wumpus is a zumpus. Zumpuses are angry. Zumpuses are vumpuses. Tumpuses are not angry. Vumpuses are not spicy. Each vumpus is a yumpus. Yumpuses are not hot. Every yumpus is an impus. Each impus is bright. Impuses are numpuses. Max is a dumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Max is angry.
